headline: Is BP Cleaning House to Stay Independent or Setting Itself Up to Be Bought?
summary: Reports surfaced at the beginning of this month that BP (NYSE: BP) is weighing a sale of all or part of its U.K. North Sea operations, potentially worth around £2 billion. This is the first major strategic move under CEO Meg O’Neill, who took over on April 1, 2026. The question now is whether BP ...
